zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Bowett於1373年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可霍斯福德時，他的父親Thomas Bowett28歲，母親Margaret le Brun21歲。他於1418年與Amy de Wythe在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年3月22日在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特博熱享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可明日香。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Bowett于1373年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可霍斯福德时，他的父亲Thomas Bowett28岁，母亲Margaret le Brun21岁。他于1418年与Amy de Wythe在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1421年3月22日在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特博熱享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可明日香。

nameMeanings.name: Bowett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: apparently from Middle English boue ‘bow, curve’ + yat ‘gate’, applied as a place-name, but the place has not been identified.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Bowett was born in 1373, in Horsford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Bowett, was 28 and his mother, Margaret le Brun, was 21. He married Amy de Wythe in 1418, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 22 March 1421, in Baugé, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, at the age of 48, and was buried in Langley, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Bowett est né en 1373, à Horsford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Bowett, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret le Brun, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Amy de Wythe en 1418, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 mars 1421, à Baugé, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Langley, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Bowett 1373 in Horsford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Bowett 28 und seine Mutter Margaret le Brun 21. Er hat 1418 in Norfolk, England Amy de Wythe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. März 1421 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Baugé, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Langley, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Amy de Wythe nel 1418, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Bowettが1373年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクホールスフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Bowettは28歳，母Margaret le Brunは21歳であった。1418年にイギリスノーフォルクでAmy de Wytheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1421年3月22日にフランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーロイアーエトバウグeで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクラングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Battle of Baugé, Baugé, Loiret, France: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 바그e
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Bowett(이)가 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 호르스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Bowett(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret le Brun(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1418년 영국 노르폴크에서 Amy de Wythe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 3월 22일 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 바그e에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 랭글리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Bowett nasceu em 1373, em Horsford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Bowett, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret le Brun, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Amy de Wythe em 1418, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de março de 1421, em Baugé, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Langley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Battle of Baugé, Baugé, Loiret, France: баугe, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Bowett родился в 1373 г. в местности хаурсфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Bowett было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret le Brun, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Amy de Wythe в 1418 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 22 марта 1421 г. в местности баугe, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности лангли, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
